_doc: Ratchet baseline for scripts/check-router-test-ratchet.cjs. List of Express routers (src/server/routes) with NO real-router supertest (behavior unverified). May only SHRINK: a NEW uncovered router fails the gate (add a *.router.test.ts that imports the real router + uses request()); covering a baselined router and not regenerating also fails. Verified routers = total - uncovered = the measured "verified working (server)" inventory.
